data.body: DECISION RECORDED (2026-06-09, audit owner direction): DEFAULT TO DELETE both e2e probe scripts (they are unowned, unreferenced, and ship dead weight in the wheel). EXCEPTION: if the team wants to keep a live-Jira field-validation probe for release QA, the adopt path requires (a) move out of src/rebar/_engine/ (e.g. scripts/), (b) sweep DSO strings + dso_label vars, (c) wire into docs/releasing.md — all three or none. Executor: do the delete unless an adopt sign-off comment exists on this ticket.
